response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development and embedded systems, including work with C/C++ and Linux, which aligns with key technical requirements. However, his primary experience is in high-level languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, D) and web/mobile development rather than embedded networking or security features. His lack of explicit experience with Linux kernel modification, network security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), and Japanese language proficiency are significant gaps.
strengths: Strong general software development skills with experience in C/C++ and Linux
Proven ability to work in embedded and real-time systems environments
Diverse technical background with contributions to open-source projects and developer tooling
concerns: Limited direct experience with embedded networking security features (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X)
No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency or Japanese work experience
Minimal exposure to chip-vendor SDKs, switch chip knowledge, or BIOS/bootloader technologies
